title: Pre-existing CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md detection (info-level)
description: Per R25 (D30 reclassified to P1): serve startup info-level check for pre-existing CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md root files. Prevents user confusion between Fabric's MCP-resource bootstrap and any existing rule files they may have.

files.change: On startStdioServer: check for project root CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md; if present, log info to stderr (non-blocking) explaining the relationship to .fabric/bootstrap/README.md
Add complementary doctor info-level check `preexisting_root_claude_md` for visibility outside startup
NEW: test that startup logs info message when root files present; doctor surfaces same

criteria: Startup detects and logs root CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md if present
